name: nacl
description: Self-contained NaCl workflows, optional project agents, and fenced multi-user graph gateway for Codex CLI and Desktop

interface.shortDescription: Run NaCl analysis and delivery workflows.
interface.longDescription: A cache-contained NaCl workflow package with bounded entry skills, optional confirmed project agent profiles, deterministic workflow routing, and a secure multi-project graph gateway with authoritative RBAC, leases, fencing, CAS, and atomic IDs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Check my NaCl installation, then route this project request to the right workflow.
